Multiple black walnut along tree line near trail. Mostly high branches out of reach, but walnuts will still drop and be good pickings. Access: Public.

High yield Concord Grapes along trail at the back of the fields. Trail loops along the boundary behind the "meadow area" and grapes are interspersed on the tree line. More in the southern side of the trail, but some more north and close to ground level. Access

Multiple overgrown raspberries and blackcaps in a massive wall of thorns. Fair productivity but surrounded by invasive multiflora rose. Managed by Concord Conservation Department, so this is regularly cut back. Access: Public.
